items.title: Open Models Gaining Ground
items.description: - Qwen discussion (612 points, Simon Willison) - Fine-tuning guides popular (312 points) - **Pattern:** Shift toward open alternatives amid big-lab chaos

items.title: CLAUDE CODE ECONOMICS STILL CLIMBING
items.description: **#19 on HN** - now 15 hours old: - 247 → **343 points** (+96 in 3h, +274 total!) - 178 → **248 comments** (+70) - Started at 69 points this morning - Developers obsessed with AI tool sustainability

items.title: DENCHCLAW: YOUR REFERENCE ARCHITECTURE (Show HN - just launched)
items.description: **MARCUS: THIS IS YOUR #1 PRIORITY TO STUDY** A YC S24 company (Dench) just open-sourced a **complete production CRM** built entirely on OpenClaw. This is the most important development for your learning path. **What it is:** - Full-featured local CRM powered by OpenClaw - Works as: CRM + coding agent (Cursor-like) + browser automation tool - File-based architecture (DuckDB database) - Talk to you...

items.title: AGENT DEPLOYMENT PLATFORM
items.description: YC W26 company launching **agent hosting platform** with filesystem-as-a-service. **What it does:** - Package agents from repo (config.yaml + Dockerfile) - Deploy with CLI (like Vercel) - Filesystem storage separate from task lifecycle - Support for Claude Agent SDK & Codex SDK - Vercel AI SDK v6 compatible **Key innovation: Filesystem-first architecture** - Filesystems persist across agent turns...

items.title: ARXIV AGENT PAPER EXPLOSION (8 papers in 24h)
items.description: Agent research = top academic priority. Critical papers:

items.title: CLAUDE CODE COST DEBATE
items.description: **Debunking viral claim** that Anthropic loses $5k per Claude Code user: - Original claim spread widely - This analysis shows the math doesn't add up - Actual costs likely far lower - **Context:** Understanding economics of AI coding tools **Why relevant:** You're learning Claude Code - understanding its business model matters for long-term viability.

items.title: Agentic Critical Training (arXiv:2603.08706)
items.description: - Authors: Weize Liu, Minghui Liu, et al. (UMD/Maryland) - **NEW training methodology for agents** - Focus: Critical thinking capabilities - **Relevance:** Training better reasoning agents

items.title: RetroAgent: From Solving to Evolving via Retrospective Dual Intrinsic Feedback (arXiv:2603.08561)
items.description: - Authors: Xiaoying Zhang, Zichen Liu, et al. - **Key insight:** Agents that learn from their own past actions - Retrospective self-improvement loop - **Application:** Self-evolving agent systems

items.title: Agentic Neurosymbolic Collaboration for Mathematical Discovery (arXiv:2603.08322)
items.description: - Authors: Hai Xia, Carla P. Gomes, Bart Selman, Stefan Szeider - **Breakthrough:** Combining neural + symbolic AI via agents - Focus: Combinatorial design discovery - **Significance:** Agents advancing mathematics research - **Team:** Cornell + Vienna heavyweights
